messages.content: Todo 1.1: PASS. Todo 1.2: PASS(T1冻结). Todo 1.3: PASS(SSoT+复现性).
Todo 1.4 3大不公平问题: 1)FIFO/DP给HDV发幽灵命令 2)speed_tracking被HDV污染 3)control_mode不一致(E-ctrl-1 vs E-ctrl-2)
4项修复: FIX-1命令过滤 FIX-2vehicle_types收集 FIX-3统一E-ctrl-2 FIX-4 no_control标注
FIX-1 APPROVE. FIX-3 FLAG(保留CLI开关). FIX-4 FLAG(需强隔离). speed_tracking自动修复. 补防呆检查.
FIX-1 APPROVE(command_builder层SRP最优). FIX-2与FIX-1冗余. FIX-3应删360行硬编码改CLI default. 补contract vehicle_type字段(FIX-5). 建议空dict fallback.
FIX-1 APPROVE. FIX-3 **REJECT**(致命风险: FIFO/DP无conflict_lane过滤,E-ctrl-2会引入全车道虚假冲突). 建议保持E-ctrl-1或补过滤. contract HDV行为合理. summarize_metrics不受影响.
VOTE(5项): FIX-1命令过滤(APPROVE) FIX-2合并到FIX-1 FIX-3改为删除硬编码覆盖尊重CLI(Gemini致命风险) FIX-4 no_control标注 FIX-5 contract补vehicle_type

Todo 1.4实现完成。改动: FIFO/DP command_builder加vehicle_types过滤, run.py收集vehicle_types+删除E-ctrl-2硬编码+baseline_role标注+contract vehicle_type, evidence_chain补vehicle_type字段。95项测试PASS(排除5个预存merge_point故障), 零回归。Sonnet+Gemini 5/5 VERIFIED。Gate 1/2/3静态PASS, Q1 FAIR_BASELINE_ANCHOR已形成。

Todo 2.1 调查发现4大问题: 1)anchor语义混淆—cross_merge(actual_pos=0)和lc_complete(actual_pos=d_to_merge)双重feedback,flexible策略cross_merge会产生系统性-20m偏差(0-20=-20); 2)contract缺stream字段,无法区分ramp/main合约; 3)无eligible_ramp_cav_contract_rate指标,Gate3的95%无法度量; 4)MergePointManager.merge_history的merge_pos_m(lane坐标)与feedback的d_to_merge(到merge_edge剩余距离)坐标系不同,未映射

5项修复: FIX-1 CONTRACT_FIELDS加stream字段+build_contract_row接收stream参数; FIX-2 定义authoritative merge event—新增resolve_anchor_event_type(merge_policy),fixed→cross_merge,flexible→lc_complete,FEEDBACK中只有matching event计入planned_actual_errors; FIX-3 build_evidence_metrics新增eligible_ramp_cav_contract_rate(eligible=entered_control+stream=ramp+type=CAV); FIX-4 冻结anchor语义—expected_merge_position_m docstring明确'到merge_edge的剩余距离',新增ANCHOR_EVENT常量; FIX-5 run.py track eligible_ramp_cav_ids集合,传入build_evidence_metrics
FIX-1 APPROVE(补unknown fallback). FIX-2 FLAG(需lc_complete缺失时fallback到cross_merge+标记anchor_fallback=true). FIX-3 APPROVE. FIX-4 APPROVE. FIX-5 APPROVE. 补审计字段anchor_event_used.

FIX-1 APPROVE(FEEDBACK_FIELDS也必须加stream). FIX-2 FLAG(lc_complete缺失兜底+resolve_anchor_event_type加default raise). FIX-3 APPROVE(eligible在进入控制区时快照). FIX-4 APPROVE(补FEEDBACK_FIELDS anchor_event_type字段). FIX-5 APPROVE(per-episode lifecycle). 最高优先:lc_complete超时兜底+FEEDBACK补stream+anchor_event_type.

FIX-2 **REJECT**(生存者偏差: flexible下zone_c_timeout的CAV无lc_complete只有cross_merge,若跳过cross_merge error则预测失败被隐藏,人为美化误差分布). 修改: flexible+无prior lc_complete的cross_merge→计入error作为惩罚. FIX-2数学: fixed position_error恒=0无预测信息,建议标记N/A. FIX-3 FLAG(仿真末期截断效应,分母含必不可能获得contract的late-arrival). R2.1 APPROVE(需强类型校验).

VOTE(7项修正): FIX-1 CONTRACT+FEEDBACK双加stream(Sonnet); FIX-2修正—三分逻辑: cross_merge+fixed→计入error(authoritative), cross_merge+flexible+已有lc_complete→跳过(去重), cross_merge+flexible+无lc_complete→计入error作为fallback惩罚(Gemini生存者偏差); FIX-2b FEEDBACK加anchor_event_type字段(Sonnet); FIX-2c resolve_anchor_event_type加default ValueError(Sonnet); FIX-3 eligible定义保持简单(进入时快照)+文档注明截断效应; FIX-4冻结语义+模块docstring; FIX-5 per-episode eligible_ramp_cav_ids+lc_complete_vehicle_ids追踪

Todo 2.1实现完成。evidence_chain.py: 模块docstring冻结anchor语义, 新增ANCHOR_EVENT_{CROSS_MERGE,LC_COMPLETE,CROSS_MERGE_FALLBACK}常量, resolve_anchor_event_type()含ValueError兜底, CONTRACT_FIELDS+FEEDBACK_FIELDS各加stream, FEEDBACK_FIELDS加anchor_event_type, build_contract_row新增stream参数, build_evidence_metrics新增eligible_ramp_cav_ids→eligible_ramp_cav_contract_rate。run.py: cross_merge feedback三分逻辑(fixed=authoritative, flex+lc_done=skip, flex+no_lc=fallback_penalty), lc_complete feedback标记anchor_event_type=lc_complete, lc_command_issued补stream+anchor_event_type, eligible_ramp_cav_ids进入时快照收集, lc_complete_vehicle_ids追踪。106项测试PASS(含11项新增), 零回归。
